## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Keep it to 1–3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mirror your commit prefixes: feat / fix / perf / refactor / docs / test /
     build / ci / chore. Check what applies. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new user-visible feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — restructure with no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs`, `test`, `build`, `ci`, `chore`

## Security-sensitive?

- [ ] Touches `crypto`, `extractors`, or `balance` (requires a pinned-vector test)
- [ ] None of the above

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages use Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, ...)
- [ ] `mise run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `mise run test` passes locally
- [ ] README / CONTRIBUTING updated if user-visible behaviour changed
